caption: A woman with dark hair is seated in an indoor setting, wearing a purple and white striped button-down shirt and black over-ear headphones. She is positioned in front of a plain white wall, with a sheer light-yellow curtain visible to her left and a light-colored piece of furniture behind her. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking, and her facial expressions and mouth movements change as she talks. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the bottom left corner of each scene. The camera remains static, focusing on her from the chest up, while she maintains a consistent posture, looking forward and speaking into the microphone of her headset.
